## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between growthx.ai and 35 for design and development support on various projects.](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai needs senior-level design and development support for client projects, internal branding, and product development](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [35 offers multidisciplinary expertise in design, development, and AI, with flexible engagement models](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Renato aims to make a decision on partnerships by Friday, seeking proposals by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

## Topics

### 35's Background and Capabilities

  - [Founded by Frank Slangen and Bob Wassermann, combining various freelance experts](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Offers multidisciplinary services including design, AI, 3D, and development](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Flexible engagement model: can work as a team or provide individual expertise](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### AI Image Generation Case Study

  - [Developed AI-powered virtual try-on tool for Bose during COVID-19](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Created AI image generation pipeline for product photography](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Successfully implemented AI-generated images in email marketing campaigns (4 million recipients, A/B tested)](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

### growthx.ai Overview and Needs

  - [AI-native marketing agency founded by ex-CMO of successful tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Rapidly growing: revenue increased from $6M to $11M, projecting $20M by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Building proprietary software to scale agency operations](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Seeking support in three main areas:](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
    1.  Client work (e.g., Surge, Lovable): branding, website development, experiential content
    2.  Internal growthx.ai branding and website refresh
    3.  Branding for standalone products and potential software suite (possibly under "output.ai")

### Collaboration Model and Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai prefers monthly retainer for preset hours/availability](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [35 offers retainer models (yearly or monthly) and project-based engagements](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Hourly rate: €110](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Renato to send detailed project examples and desired workflow by 4 PM](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Renato to send additional project details and requirements via email by 4 PM](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [35 to review information and prepare a proposal](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [35 to submit proposal by Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Renato to make decision on partnerships by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/wm39_ych_ezEGN-ZSKA2hVQBRWQbjyzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
